# Airport Express 50% off JoyYou Card Offer

![ ](/ch/customer/images/tickets/ael-joyyou-web-en.jpg)

Traveling on the Airport Express to get to the airport means you won’t have to worry about traffic congestion. It takes you only about 24 minutes to travel from Hong Kong Station to the airport, with trains departing every 10 minutes!

What’s more, from 1 July 2026 to 30 June 2027, JoyYou Card holders aged 60 or above using a valid JoyYou Card can enjoy 50% off Octopus fares on the Airport Express from Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station to the airport, or vice versa.

  
 **To / From Airport**

| Stations | 50% off Octopus Fares   JoyYou Card Holder (Aged 60 or above) |
| --- | --- |
| Hong Kong Station | $60.0 |
| Kowloon Station | $52.5 |
| Tsing Yi Station | $36.5 |

All prices listed are in Hong Kong dollars

If your accompanying friends or family members are under 60 years old, you can also consider purchasing group tickets at the Airport Express Customer Service Centres (except AsiaWorld-Expo Station). Whether travelling in a group of 2, 3, or 4, you can enjoy promotional fares of up to 42% off. Click [here](https://www.mtr.com.hk/en/customer/tickets/promotions_4persons.html) to know more about the Group Ticket Offer.

**Terms and Conditions:**

1. The promotion period is from 1 July 2026 to 30 June 2027, in accordance with the daily operating hours of the Airport Express.
2. The offer is applicable to the Airport Express journeys between Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station and Airport Station only.
3. The offer is applicable to passengers aged 60 or above using a valid JoyYou Card only. It is NOT applicable to JoyYou Card holders under 60 years old or passengers using an Elder Octopus.
4. Passengers can enjoy 50% off Octopus fare discount automatically when passing through the ticket gate of Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station with a valid JoyYou Card that holds a positive balance.
5. Passengers using this offer can still enjoy the free MTR connections. For passengers taking journeys starting with MTR lines followed by the Airport Express, the journey with the lower fare will be free.
6. Passengers using this offer can still enjoy the free return journey when traveling to and from the Airport Station on the same day (except for journey between the Airport Station and AsiaWorld-Expo Station). However, the 50% off Octopus fare discount does not apply to the additional fares incurred due to the difference between the boarding and destination stations.
7. The offer is not applicable to passengers who purchase group tickets, smart tickets or QR Code tickets for taking the Airport Express.
8. The offer cannot be exchanged for cash and cannot be used in conjunction with any other offers.
9. The Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance shall not apply to the terms and conditions herein.
10. MTR Corporation Limited reserves the right to make the final decision in the event of any dispute.

# Privileges and Complimentary Services

![Free MTR Connections](/ch/customer/images/promotion/ael/AEL_AWE_offer_EN_v3.jpg)

## Free MTR Connections

Passengers taking the Airport Express to interchange to MTR lines can enjoy free MTR connections. To benefit from this offer, simply use the same Octopus (with sufficient value), Contactless Bank Card\* or e-wallet QR Code to interchange within one hour of arrival between the Airport Express at Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station and the interconnecting MTR Station, including Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau Station (except the Light Rail, MTR Bus and East Rail Line First Class). There should not be more than 9 transaction records on the Octopus between the Airport Express and MTR rides.

When changing between Tsim Sha Tsui/ East Tsim Sha Tsui Station, passengers using Octopus must do so within 30 minutes of arrival at either station. Passengers using Contactless Bank Card\* or QR Code to transfer via Tsim Sha Tsui/ East Tsim Sha Tsui Station will have the journeys treated as two separate trips and charged separately. Such interchange is not eligible for the free connection offer. Only the MTR journey taken immediately before or after the Airport Express trip is eligible for the free connection. For passengers taking journeys starting with MTR lines followed by the Airport Express, the journey with the lower fare will be free.

## Same Day Return Fare Offer

Same Day Return fares are valid when you use the Adult/ Child Same Day Return Ticket purchased from any Airport Express Customer Service Centre or Ticket Issuing Machines, or use the same Octopus, Contactless Bank Card\* or e-wallet QR Code to take a round trip between AsiaWorld-Expo Station and Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station on the same day^ to enjoy a free return journey. There are even Special Same Day Return fares which are valid when you use the same Octopus, Contactless Bank Card\* or e-wallet QR Code to travel to and from AsiaWorld-Expo Station on the same day^ and stay in AsiaWorld-Expo for a minimum of 1 hour between exiting and re-entering the station ticket gate#.

Passengers using contactless card\* or e-wallet QR code will not be eligible for the free return offer if they use the same payment method for any journey other than the eligible Airport Express return trip during the period between outbound gate and return gate exit.

\* Credit Card or Debit Card (not including UnionPay Debit Card)   
 ^ Same day refers to the period of time between the daily start of the first train and the end of service.   
 # There should not be more than 9 transaction records on the Octopus during the entry and exit period.

# Airport Express Service Guide

![Image 4](https://www.mtr.com.hk/digitalleaflet/images/icon_printer.svg) Print this article 

#### Airport Express — The fast and reliable link

With the Airport Express, you are never far from town. There is a train every 10 minutes, ready to whisk you between the airport and Hong Kong Station in the heart of the shopping and commercial district in about 24 minutes. Or travel to the AsiaWorld-Expo in around 2 minutes from the airport. Plus, with connection to other MTR Lines, all of the territory is within reach.

Service hours: 5:50am to 1:15am

#### Special service exclusively for Airport Express passengers

**Free In-town Check-in Service**

Airport Express passengers can use the In-town Check-in service offered by the specified airlines at Hong Kong or Kowloon Station during the service hours listed below. This service is only applicable to flights operated by the specified airlines (not applicable to codeshare flights operated by other airlines) and is only available to passengers holding valid electronic travel documents. For all other passengers, please proceed to the airport for check-in.

Cathay Pacific Service Hours

Hong Kong Station: 6:00am to 11:00pm

Kowloon Station: 6:00am to 3:00pm

China Airlines Service Hours

Hong Kong Station: 9:00am to 6:00pm

Hong Kong Airlines Service Hours

Hong Kong Station: 6:00am to 7:00pm

Kowloon Station: 6:00am to 3:00pm

Mandarin Airlines Service Hours

Hong Kong Station: 9:00am to 6:00pm

Qantas Airways Service Hours

Hong Kong Station: 7:00am to 6:35pm

Kowloon Station: 7:00am to 3:00pm

Singapore Airlines Service Hours

Hong Kong Station: 9:00am to 5:20pm

Passengers with valid electronic travel documents can check-in^ as early as 24 hours in advance and up to 90 minutes before their scheduled flight departure time during the service hours. The service hours and check-in times of airlines may vary depending on their flight schedules, and you are advised to contact your airline for updated information.

Passengers can save time by using the Smart Check-in Kiosks at In-town Check-In area to check-in, and collect their boarding passes and luggage tags. After completing the check-in process with the kiosks, passengers can proceed to the Self Bag Drop Counters to drop off their baggage. (If you use an Octopus, Contactless Bank Card* or QR Code to access the Airport Express, your full fare will be deducted at the In-town Check-in entry gate rather than when you board the train. The same Octopus, Contactless Bank Card* or e-wallet QR Code must be used to enter the In-town Check-in area and the platform, and during this period, there should not be more than 9 transaction records on the Octopus.)

^ For enquiries on baggage dimensions / weight allowance, please check with your airline or Airport Express station staff.

* Credit Card or Debit Card (not including UnionPay Debit Card)

**Free In-train Wi-Fi service**

Passengers traveling on the Airport Express can now conveniently enjoy free Wi-Fi wireless broadband service with your Wi-Fi enabled gadgets. (Service provided by Hong Kong Telecommunications (HKT) Limited.)

**Complimentary In-train Power Charging Service in Designated Cars**

Passengers traveling on the Airport Express can now stay “charged-up” throughout the train journey. In-train power charging facilities are now provided in the first and last cars of Airport Express trains for passengers to charge their mobile devices or laptop computers.

**Free MTR Connections**

Passengers taking the Airport Express to interchange to MTR lines can enjoy free MTR connections. To benefit from this offer, simply use the same Octopus (with sufficient value), Contactless Bank Card# or e-wallet QR Code to interchange within one hour of arrival between the Airport Express at Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station and the interconnecting MTR Station, including Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau Station (except the Light Rail, MTR Bus and East Rail Line First Class). The Octopus should not have more than 9 transaction records between the Airport Express and MTR rides.

When changing between Tsim Sha Tsui/ East Tsim Sha Tsui Station, passengers using Octopus must do so within 30 minutes of arrival at either station. Passengers using Contactless Bank Card# or QR Code to transfer via Tsim Sha Tsui/ East Tsim Sha Tsui Station will have the journeys treated as two separate trips and charged separately. Such interchange is not eligible for the free connection offer. Only the MTR journey taken immediately before or after the Airport Express trip is eligible for the free connection. For passengers taking journeys starting with MTR lines followed by the Airport Express, the journey with the lower fare will be free.

# Credit Card or Debit Card (not including UnionPay Debit Card)

**Free Return Journey for Same Day Round Trip**

Passengers taking the Airport Express for a round trip to and from the airport within the same day* can enjoy a FREE return journey (except for journey between Airport and AsiaWorld-Expo Station). This offer is applicable to Octopus, Contactless Bank Card#, QR Code and Same Day Return ticket holders. For Octopus, Contactless Bank Card# and QR Code users, the same Octopus, Contactless Bank Card#, QR Code must be used for entry and exit at Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station, and there should not be more than 9 transaction records on the Octopus during the entry and exit period. Passengers using contactless card# or e-wallet QR code will not be eligible for the free return offer if they use the same payment method for any journey other than the eligible Airport Express return trip during the period between outbound gate and return gate entry or exit.

* Same day refers to the period of time between the daily start of the first train and the end of service.

# Credit Card or Debit Card (not including UnionPay Debit Card)

**Park & Ride and Park & Fly Offer**

Hong Kong, Kowloon, and Tsing Yi stations offer parking facilities, making it highly convenient for drivers to park their vehicles and transfer to the Airport Express to travel to and from the airport or AsiaWorld-Expo Station. Passengers can simply use the same Octopus card to enter and exit the car park and travel on the Airport Express during the parking period to enjoy these parking offers. Please [learn more](https://www.mtr.com.hk/en/customer/services/stations_carpark.html) for details.

![tickets and fares](../images/banner_tickets.jpg)

**Tickets and Fares**

-

# RIDE TOGETHER ON THE AIRPORT EXPRESS TO ENJOY A GROUP TICKET PROMOTIONAL FARE AS LOW AS HK$42.5 PER PERSON

![ ](/ch/customer/images/promotion/AEL_Summer_Campaign_2025_GroupTicket_PromotionPageInnerBanner_600x300px_v3_EN.jpg)

Planning a trip with your buddies? Instead of gathering at the airport, why don't you all set off together at an Airport Express station! Apart from enjoying the special fare offer, it only takes you about 24 minutes to travel from Hong Kong Station to the airport, with trains departing frequently at every 10 minutes, and you do not need to worry about traffic congestion.

If you're traveling in a group of 2 to 4, all of you can take advantage of the "Ride Together" offer when purchasing Single Journey Tickets to travel to/from the airport and the designated stations (Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi Station) at the Airport Express Customer Service Centre (excluding AsiaWorld-Expo Station) and enjoy promotional fares as low as HK$42.5 per person.

| Ride Together | Group of 2 | Group of 3 | Group of 4 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Hong Kong - Airport | $170  $85 per person | $230  $76.7 per person | $280  $70 per person |
| Kowloon - Airport | $150  $75 per person | $210  $70 per person | $250  $62.5 per person |
| Tsing Yi - Airport | $100  $50 per person | $140  $46.7 per person | $170  $42.5 per person |

All prices listed are in Hong Kong dollars

  
 **Terms and Conditions:**

1. Passengers travelling together in designated groups can use an Airport Express Group Ticket for a single journey on the Airport Express from Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi stations to Airport Station or vice versa.
2. Passengers can choose a Group of 2, Group of 3 or Group of 4 Single Journey Ticket Set, which comprise two, three or four tickets that entitle two, three or four passengers respectively travelling together on the Airport Express to or from Airport and the station specified (except AsiaWorld-Expo Station).
3. The price per person illustrates the average price per person in a single journey of the Airport Express Group Ticket. Passengers travelling in group must purchase the Group Tickets in the same transaction.
4. Passengers using the designated Airport Express Group Ticket must travel together in a group, and they may be asked to present the tickets for inspection by MTR staff.
5. Tickets can only be purchased at designated Airport Express stations. Each Airport Express station only sells Group Tickets that depart from that specific station to the destination and tickets are valid on the day of issue only.
6. Tickets sold are not refundable. Malfunctioning tickets can be processed at any Airport Express Customer Service Centre (except AsiaWorld-Expo Station).
7. Ticket usage is subject to the By-laws and Conditions of Issue.
8. The Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance shall not apply to the terms and conditions herein.
9. MTR Corporation Limited reserves the right to make the final decision in the event of any dispute.

MTR Hotline: 2881 8888

# Airport Express Group Travel

![Image 4](https://www.mtr.com.hk/digitalleaflet/images/icon_printer.svg) Print this article 

#### Ride together on the Airport Express to enjoy a group ticket promotional fare as low as HK$42.5 per person

Planning a trip with your buddies? Instead of gathering at the airport, why don’t you all set off together at an Airport Express station! Apart from enjoying the special fare offer, it only takes you about 24 minutes to travel from Hong Kong Station to the airport, with trains departing frequently at every 10 minutes, and you do not need to worry about traffic congestion.

If you're traveling in a group of 2 to 4, all of you can take advantage of the "Ride Together" offer when purchasing Single Journey Tickets to travel to/from the airport and the designated stations (Hong Kong, Kowloon, or Tsing Yi Station) at the Airport Express Customer Service Centre (excluding AsiaWorld-Expo Station) and enjoy promotional fares as low as HK$42.5 per person.

**Ride Together****Group of 2****Group of 3****Group of 4**
Hong Kong - Airport$170

($85 per person)$230

($76.7 per person)$280

($70 per person)
Kowloon - Airport$150

($75 per person)$210

($70 per person)$250

($62.5 per person)
Tsing Yi - Airport$100

($50 per person)$140

($46.7 per person)$170

($42.5 per person)

All prices listed are in Hong Kong dollars

### **Terms & Conditions:**

1.   Passengers travelling together in designated groups can use an Airport Express Group Ticket for a single journey on the Airport Express from Hong Kong, Kowloon or Tsing Yi stations to Airport Station or vice versa.

2.   Passengers can choose a Group of 2, Group of 3 or Group of 4 Single Journey Ticket Set, which comprise two, three or four tickets that entitle two, three or four passengers respectively travelling together on the Airport Express to or from Airport and the station specified (except AsiaWorld-Expo Station).

3.   The price per person illustrates the average price per person in a single journey of the Airport Express Group Ticket. Passengers travelling in group must purchase the Group Tickets in the same transaction.

4.   Passengers using the designated Airport Express Group Ticket must travel together in a group, and they may be asked to present the tickets for inspection by MTR staff.

5.   Tickets can only be purchased at designated Airport Express stations. Each Airport Express station only sells Group Tickets that depart from that specific station to the destination and tickets are valid on the day of issue only.

6.   Tickets sold are not refundable. Malfunctioning tickets can be processed at any Airport Express Customer Service Centre (except AsiaWorld-Expo Station)

7.   Ticket usage is subject to the By-laws and Conditions of Issue.

8.   The Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance shall not apply to the terms and conditions herein.

9.   MTR Corporation Limited reserves the right to make the final decision in the event of any dispute.

MTR Hotline: 2881 8888
